# playwright-scenarios

> Claude Code plugin marketplace for scenario-driven Playwright testing — record scenarios by driving a browser, audit them against the live site, and generate JVM Playwright + Kotest tests from the reviewed markdown.

This repository is a Claude Code plugin marketplace (no application source). It ships a single plugin, `playwright-scenarios`, that lets projects author browser-driven test scenarios as flat markdown files (manually or via autonomous crawl), audit those scenarios against the live site, and translate them into test classes. Per-project behavior is driven by `.claude/playwright-scenarios.local.md` (default stack: Kotlin + Kotest StringSpec + Playwright-for-Java).

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Installation, host-project setup (Gradle tasks, dependencies, base test class), and the record → review → generate workflow.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Repo orientation for Claude — layout, version-bump rule, and testing notes.
- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md): Release notes.

## Plugin manifests

- [marketplace.json](.claude-plugin/marketplace.json): Marketplace manifest listing the `playwright-scenarios` plugin.
- [plugin.json](plugins/playwright-scenarios/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): Plugin manifest (name, version, description, author).

## Commands

- [/record-scenario](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/record-scenario.md): Launch Playwright codegen, capture a real user flow, and write a draft scenario markdown file. Auto-chains into `/review-scenario` unless `--no-review` is passed.
- [/crawl-site](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/crawl-site.md): Read-only crawl starting from a URL; emits user-flow-oriented drafts to `<scenario_dir>/drafts/`. Accepts `--depth` and `--max-scenarios`. Complementary seed-generator to `/record-scenario`.
- [/review-scenario](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/review-scenario.md): Audit scenarios against the live site and apply improvements to the markdown. Accepts `--include-drafts`.
- [/scenario-to-tests](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/scenario-to-tests.md): Generate tests (Kotlin + Kotest StringSpec by default) from reviewed scenarios. Accepts `--include-drafts` and `--dry-run`.
- [/playwright-scenarios-config](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/config.md): View or update per-project settings stored in `.claude/playwright-scenarios.local.md`. Also the recovery path for a malformed config file.

## Skills

- [loading-config](plugins/playwright-scenarios/skills/loading-config/SKILL.md): Reads `.claude/playwright-scenarios.local.md`; prompts the user and bootstraps it on first use. Invoked at the start of every playwright-scenarios command.
- [authoring-scenarios](plugins/playwright-scenarios/skills/authoring-scenarios/SKILL.md): Flat-markdown scenario format reference; used whenever Claude hand-writes or edits a scenario markdown file.

## Optional

- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md)
